name: Nam Prik Ong Minced Pork
intro: rinds, boiled cabbage wedges and sticky rice.

ingredients.item: young Northern Thai green chilies (prik num) roasted on a baking tray in the oven and peeled after cooling
mashed anchovies or other salted fi sh meat

method: In a mortar and pestle, pound together the chilies, shallots and garlic.
Add the anchovies, fi sh sauce, lime juice and palm sugar. Mix well and taste. Flavors should be salty and spicy.
